🚨DALLAS: @ICEgov is asking local authorities to NOT RELEASE Luis Benitez-Gonzalez, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, who has been accused of committing TWO MURDERS in Central Texas.

DNA evidence links Benitez-Gonzalez to separate murders in Texas over the course of six years: The killing of 28-year-old Alba Jenisse Aviles in Bastrop County in 2018, and the killing of 34-year-old Alyssa Ann Rivera in Austin in 2024.

Since Dallas cooperates with ICE law enforcement, we’re working with local law enforcement to ensure this murderer is NEVER loose in American neighborhoods again.

Yesterday, the courageous men and women of @ICEgov were hard at work arresting dangerous criminals, including a hit and run killer, a pedophile, and violent thugs:
